description:
A backup software for your Mac or Windows PC.


Bug Fixes
- Fixed the backup-plan detail view still saying "Y GB budget (not yet backed up)" after the first backup. The budget row now updates immediately when the backup set is initialized.
- Fixed the budget progress bar in the backup-plan detail view overlapping the value text. The bar is now anchored to the right edge and the value text expands with the window width.
- Fixed budget enforcement on all-drives backup plans, which previously logged "No backup records available to delete" without making any progress.
- Cleanup of unreferenced data now skips objects whose object-lock retention has not yet expired, avoiding long cleanup runs.
